revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: mass import of programmatically generated pages to give attribution and fill redlinks

Text replacement - "[[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>" to "<includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>"
Text replacement - "<includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly>" to "[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]"
revision.text: [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Mbox templates see also]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

{{view|Template:Mbox templates see also|edit|brackets=yes}} There are seven metatemplates in the [[Module:Message box]] family:
* {{tl|Ambox}}, for messageboxes on article pages. * {{tl|Cmbox}}, for messageboxes on category pages. * {{tl|Imbox}}, for messageboxes on file (image) pages. * {{tl|Tmbox}}, for messageboxes on talk pages. * {{tl|Fmbox}}, for header and footer messageboxes. * {{tl|Ombox}}, for messageboxes on other types of page. * {{tl|Mbox}}, for messageboxes that are used in different [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespaces]] and change their presentation accordingly. Closely related metatemplates: * {{tl|Article stub box}}, for messageboxes in article stubs. * {{tl|Dmbox}}, for messageboxes on disambiguation or set-index pages. * {{tla|Ivory messagebox|Ivmbox}}, a simple full-width box with default ivory background intended to frame important messages or notices. {{Documentation}}

{{view|Template:Mbox templates see also|edit|brackets=yes}} There are seven metatemplates in the [[Module:Message box]] family:
* {{tl|Ambox}}, for messageboxes on article pages. * {{tl|Cmbox}}, for messageboxes on category pages. * {{tl|Imbox}}, for messageboxes on file (image) pages. * {{tl|Tmbox}}, for messageboxes on talk pages. * {{tl|Fmbox}}, for header and footer messageboxes. * {{tl|Ombox}}, for messageboxes on other types of page. * {{tl|Mbox}}, for messageboxes that are used in different [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespaces]] and change their presentation accordingly. Closely related metatemplates: * {{tl|Article stub box}}, for messageboxes in article stubs. * {{tl|Dmbox}}, for messageboxes on disambiguation or set-index pages. * {{tla|Ivory messagebox|Ivmbox}}, a simple full-width box with default ivory background intended to frame important messages or notices. {{Documentation}}

{{view|Template:Mbox templates see also|edit|brackets=yes}} There are seven metatemplates in the [[Module:Message box]] family:
* {{tl|Ambox}}, for messageboxes on article pages. * {{tl|Cmbox}}, for messageboxes on category pages. * {{tl|Imbox}}, for messageboxes on file (image) pages. * {{tl|Tmbox}}, for messageboxes on talk pages. * {{tl|Fmbox}}, for header and footer messageboxes. * {{tl|Ombox}}, for messageboxes on other types of page. * {{tl|Mbox}}, for messageboxes that are used in different [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespaces]] and change their presentation accordingly. Closely related metatemplates: * {{tl|Article stub box}}, for messageboxes in article stubs. * {{tl|Dmbox}}, for messageboxes on disambiguation or set-index pages. * {{tla|Ivory messagebox|Ivmbox}}, a simple full-width box with default ivory background intended to frame important messages or notices. {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: trying to get the ambox in
revision.text:
{{view|Template:Mbox templates see also|edit|brackets=yes}} There are seven metatemplates in the [[Module:Message box]] family:
* {{tl|Ambox}}, for messageboxes on article pages. * {{tl|Cmbox}}, for messageboxes on category pages. * {{tl|Imbox}}, for messageboxes on file (image) pages. * {{tl|Tmbox}}, for messageboxes on talk pages. * {{tl|Fmbox}}, for header and footer messageboxes. * {{tl|Ombox}}, for messageboxes on other types of page. * {{tl|Mbox}}, for messageboxes that are used in different [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespaces]] and change their presentation accordingly. Closely related metatemplates: * {{tl|Article stub box}}, for messageboxes in article stubs. * {{tl|Dmbox}}, for messageboxes on disambiguation or set-index pages. * {{tla|Ivory messagebox|Ivmbox}}, a simple full-width box with default ivory background intended to frame important messages or notices. {{Documentation}}

revision.text:
{{view|Template:Mbox templates see also|edit|brackets=yes}} There are seven metatemplates in the [[Module:Message box]] family:
* {{tl|Ambox}}, for messageboxes on article pages. * {{tl|Cmbox}}, for messageboxes on category pages. * {{tl|Imbox}}, for messageboxes on file (image) pages. * {{tl|Tmbox}}, for messageboxes on talk pages. * {{tl|Fmbox}}, for header and footer messageboxes. * {{tl|Ombox}}, for messageboxes on other types of page. * {{tl|Mbox}}, for messageboxes that are used in different [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespaces]] and change their presentation accordingly. Closely related metatemplates: * {{tl|Article stub box}}, for messageboxes in article stubs. * {{tl|Dmbox}}, for messageboxes on disambiguation or set-index pages. * {{tla|Ivory messagebox|Ivmbox}}, a simple full-width box with default ivory background intended to frame important messages or notices. {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{view|Template:Mbox templates see also|edit|brackets=yes}} There are seven metatemplates in the [[Module:Message box]] family:
* {{tl|Ambox}}, for messageboxes on article pages. * {{tl|Cmbox}}, for messageboxes on category pages. * {{tl|Imbox}}, for messageboxes on file (image) pages. * {{tl|Tmbox}}, for messageboxes on talk pages. * {{tl|Fmbox}}, for header and footer messageboxes. * {{tl|Ombox}}, for messageboxes on other types of page. * {{tl|Mbox}}, for messageboxes that are used in different [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespaces]] and change their presentation accordingly. Closely related metatemplates: * {{tl|Article stub box}}, for messageboxes in article stubs. * {{tl|Dmbox}}, for messageboxes on disambiguation or set-index pages. * {{tla|Ivory messagebox|Ivmbox}}, a simple full-width box with default ivory background intended to frame important messages or notices. {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{view|Template:Mbox templates see also|edit|brackets=yes}} There are seven metatemplates in the [[Module:Message box]] family:
* {{tl|Ambox}}, for messageboxes on article pages. * {{tl|Cmbox}}, for messageboxes on category pages. * {{tl|Imbox}}, for messageboxes on file (image) pages. * {{tl|Tmbox}}, for messageboxes on talk pages. * {{tl|Fmbox}}, for header and footer messageboxes. * {{tl|Ombox}}, for messageboxes on other types of page. * {{tl|Mbox}}, for messageboxes that are used in different [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespaces]] and change their presentation accordingly. revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{view|Template:Mbox templates see also|edit|brackets=yes}} There are seven metatemplates in the [[Module:Message box]] family:
* {{tl|Ambox}}, for messageboxes on article pages. * {{tl|Cmbox}}, for messageboxes on category pages. * {{tl|Imbox}}, for messageboxes on file (image) pages. * {{tl|Tmbox}}, for messageboxes on talk pages. * {{tl|Fmbox}}, for header and footer messageboxes. * {{tl|Ombox}}, for messageboxes on other types of page. * {{tl|Mbox}}, for messageboxes that are used in different [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespaces]] and change their presentation accordingly. Closely related metatemplates: * {{tl|Article stub box}}, for messageboxes in article stubs. * {{tl|Dmbox}}, for messageboxes on disambiguation or set-index pages. * {{tla|Ivory messagebox|Ivmbox}}, a simple full-width box with default ivory background intended to frame important messages or notices. {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23513454770|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{view|Template:Mbox templates see also|edit|brackets=yes}} There are seven metatemplates in the [[Module:Message box]] family:
* {{tl|Ambox}}, for messageboxes on article pages. * {{tl|Cmbox}}, for messageboxes on category pages. * {{tl|Imbox}}, for messageboxes on file (image) pages. * {{tl|Tmbox}}, for messageboxes on talk pages. * {{tl|Fmbox}}, for header and footer messageboxes. * {{tl|Ombox}}, for messageboxes on other types of page. * {{tl|Mbox}}, for messageboxes that are used in different [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespaces]] and change their presentation accordingly. Closely related metatemplates: * {{tl|Article stub box}}, for messageboxes in article stubs. * {{tl|Dmbox}}, for messageboxes on disambiguation or set-index pages. * {{tla|Ivory messagebox|Ivmbox}}, a simple full-width box with default ivory background intended to frame important messages or notices. {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
